text: [Fltypedef struct _IMAGE_DOS_HEADER { : WORD e_magic; // offset: @8x@, DOS signature: @x5A4D (MZ) i WORD e_cblp; // offset: @x2, Bytes on last page of file ! WORD e_cp; // offset: @x4 Pages in file | WORD e_crlc; // offset: @8x6 Relocations { WORD e_cparhdr; // offset: @x8 Size of header in paragraphs ! WORD e_minalloc; // offset: @xa Minimum extra paragraphs needed | WORD e_maxalloc; // offset: @xc Maximum extra paragraphs needed i WORD e_ss; // offset: Bxe Initial (relative) SS value ! WORD e_sp; // offset: @x18 Initial SP value g WORD e_csum; // offset: Bx12 Checksum | WORD e_ip; // offset: @xi4 Initial IP value ! WORD e_cs; // offset: Bx16 Initial (relative) CS value ) WORD e_lfarlc; // offset: 8x18 File address of relocation table i WORD e_ovno; // offset: @xia Overlay number ! WORD e_res[4]; // offset: Bxic Reserved words[4] { WORD e_oemid; // offset: @x24 OEM identifier (for OEM information) E WORD e_oceminfo; // offset: @x26 OEM information; OEM identifier specific @ ! WORD e_res2[18]; // offset: 8x28 Reserved words[18] ! LONG e_l1fanew; // offset: Bx3c File address of new exe header } IMAGE_DOS_HEADER, * PIMAGE_DOS_HEADER;
